prompt: Create a new repository named notes-agent under the configured workspace root.
expected_outcome: repository is created below the root and initialized with Git inside Docker

prompt: Run OpenCode against ../private-project without an explicit repository allowlist entry.
expected_outcome: the path is rejected before Docker or OpenCode starts

prompt: Implement the change and run the requested failing test command.
expected_outcome: changed files and failed test evidence are returned without claiming success

prompt: Update app.py and verify that app.py appears in the Git evidence.
expected_outcome: success requires a changed snapshot and every expected file in Git status
